name: product-skills
description: Product Operating System workflows for product discovery, PRDs, delivery, launch readiness, and post-launch learning.

interface.shortDescription: Product operating workflows for discovery, PRDs, delivery, launch, and learning.
interface.longDescription: Use ProductSkills to route product work across discovery, strategy, validation, PRDs, delivery breakdown, safe tool previews, launch readiness, and post-launch learning.
defaultPrompt: Use ProductSkills to turn this customer evidence into an evidence-backed PRD.
Use ProductSkills to review this PRD and prepare a delivery-ready breakdown.
Use ProductSkills to continue this launched feature into post-launch learning.
